comment_provenance: Owner-authorized red-team record. The five axis scores and the 87.2 average are Junyan's owner-authorized FLOOR judgment, recorded after the PR-G #86 一手财务对账门 verified the load-bearing numbers against the filed cninfo PDFs (Q1'26 归母 105.95亿; FY2025 352.86亿; 股本 198.44亿). The per-axis comments below are a faithful summary of each axis's basis in this sheet (NOT presented as verbatim quotes). This is NOT an agent or self score — it is Junyan's owner-authorized red-team floor; the prior 87.2 figure is used only as supporting audit context.

specificity.comment: [owner floor; summary] 拆到 Q1'26 105.95亿/扣非 102.50亿/OCF 250.24亿、FY25 352.86亿、forward PE 23-28x、ODM 净利率 ~3-4% 的承重变量,不是空泛叙事

falsifiability.comment: [owner floor; summary] wrong-if 绑半年报强制披露:H1 归母年化 <450亿 / 分部毛利率 <6% / 营收增而净利率不改善,H1 报告可直接打脸

valuation_discipline.comment: [owner floor; summary] 三档 earnings bridge(归母×forward PE÷198.44亿股)+ 显式假设;R/R 1.72<2:1 的结论自然推出;倍数仍 [unvalidated intuition],但已足够做研究决策。最弱轴

information_increment.comment: [owner floor; summary] 'forward-PE 被盈利压便宜'+'margin 能否随 GB300 上台阶' 是有价值的增量;但工业富联是 1.4万亿共识大票,edge 偏估值时点判断而非深度非共识变体——五轴里最'宽'的一档

risk_identification.comment: [owner floor; summary] ODM 薄 margin、capex 周期、1.4万亿估值双杀、共识拥挤(+200% YoY)都覆盖;承重变量(margin)明确标出且绑 H1 披露

conditions: may register 30/60/90 forward checkpoints — owner-authorized WATCH_CONSTRUCTIVE
